section_miscategorizations.text: He reports coarse rhonchi bilaterally and erythema and edema of the nasal turbinates bilaterally with yellow discharge.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Coarse rhonchi and nasal turbinate erythema/edema with discharge are physical exam findings, not patient-reported symptoms. Documenting them in HPI could mislead a reader about whether these were actually observed on exam.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient reports bilateral cervical lymphadenopathy.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Cervical lymphadenopathy is an exam finding. Placing it in HPI blurs the distinction between patient-reported symptoms and clinician-observed physical findings.
